commit.subject: LU-19304 tests: reduce number of files in sanity/190b
commit.message:
LU-19304 tests: reduce number of files in sanity/190b

it doesn't need to be huge for functional testing,
keep it high for slow sessions.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 8efd324646 ("LU-13335 utils: allow projid lookup by name")
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I67ae2f22cf9c5b23767d279ad4d17f03d94df49c
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60941
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Frederick Dilger <fdilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
